title: Junior Revenue Manager at Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited:
Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited!
